faqs.question: What does general pest control in Kew Gardens include?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control service covers treatment and prevention for common pests including cockroaches, ants, spiders, silverfish, earwigs, mice, and rats. We inspect your property, apply targeted treatments to affected areas, seal entry points, and provide ongoing prevention recommendations specific to Kew Gardens homes and apartments.

faqs.question: Why does the price range from $175 to $300?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on your property size, infestation severity, and treatment complexity. A small Kew Gardens apartment with minor ant activity starts at $175, while larger multi-family homes or severe infestations requiring multiple treatment methods may cost up to $300. We always provide a free inspection and transparent quote before beginning work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you service my Kew Gardens property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Kew Gardens when availability permits. Most general pest control appointments can be scheduled within 24-48 hours. faqs.question: Are your treatments safe for families and pets in Kew Gardens homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Many Kew Gardens families trust us for safe, effective pest control in their homes.
